mapper.select:
SELECT user_seq, user_id, user_name FROM tb_user WHERE 1=1
AND (user_name LIKE CONCAT('%',#{searchText},'%') OR user_id LIKE CONCAT('%',#{searchText},'%'))
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tb_login_log ( user_seq ,user_login_seq ,login_date_time ,access_ip ,user_agent ,access_cd ) VALUES ( #{userSeq} ,(select coalesce(max(user_login_seq),0) + 1 from tb_login_log where user_seq =#{userSeq}) ,now() ,#{accessIp} ,#{userAgent} ,'A0802' )
